title: Isolation of the Antioxidant Metabolite from the EAF
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bqjn9","text":"EAF (4.13 g), which showed the most antioxidantactivity, was subjected to column chromatography on a silica gel column chromatography (CC), employing a step gradient of CH2Cl2-CH3OH (10:1, 10:2, 10:3, 10:5, 1:1, 0:1, v/v) and afforded eleven fractions (Fr. 1-Fr. 9) (Fig. 1). Fr. 2 was subjected to open silica gel CC using a successive elution of EtOAc-CH3OH (10:1-0:1, v/v) to yield fractions Fr. 2.1-2.4. Fr. 2.2 and 2.4 were isolated using Sephadex LH-20 CC/ODS-HPLC to afford 6 (8.1mg, 0.20%) and 7 (20mg, 0.48%). Fr. 4 was subjected to polyamide CC using CH2Cl2-CH3OH-HCOOH as eluent (10:2:1, v/v). Promising subfraction Fr. 4-3 was eluted using CH3OH-H2O (1:1-1:0, v/v) withRP C-18 CC. Final purification was achieved by polyamide CC using CH2Cl2-CH3OH (10:4, v/v) to yield 1 (0.803 g, 19.44%).Fr.5 was subjected to polyamide CC with CH2Cl2-EtOAc-CH3OH(5:5:1,v/v) as the solvent. Fr.5-3 and Fr. 5-5 were isolated using polyamide/RP C-18/Sephadex LH-20 CC to yield 5 (11mg, 0.27%), 11 (8mg, 0.19%) and 12 (5mg, 0.12%). Fr.7.1 collected from Fr. 7 with EtOAc-CH3OH(10:2, v/v) were passed through polyamide CC, and purified by ODS-HPLC using a gradient of CH3OH-H2O(3:7-9:1,v/v))as eluent to yield 3 (10mg, 0.24%) and 9 (5mg, 0.12%). Fr. 8-1, Fr.8-3 and Fr.8-4 obtained from Fr. 8 with CH2Cl2-CH3OH(10:2,v/v) were isolated using ODS- HPLC/Sephadex LH-20 CC to yield 2 (150mg, 3.63%), 4 (5mg, 0.12%), 8 (3mg, 0.07%) and 10 (8mg, 0.19%).EAF (4.13 g), which showed the most antioxidantactivity, was subjected to column chromatography on a silica gel column chromatography (CC), employing a step gradient of CH2Cl2-CH3OH (10:1, 10:2, 10:3, 10:5, 1:1, 0:1, v/v) and afforded eleven fractions (Fr. 1-Fr. 9) (Fig. 1). Fr. 2 was subjected to open silica gel CC using a successive elution of EtOAc-CH3OH (10:1-0:1, v/v) to yield fractions Fr. 2.1-2.4. Fr. 2.2 and 2.4 were isolated using Sephadex LH-20 CC/ODS-HPLC to afford 6 (8.1mg, 0.54‱) and 7 (20mg, 1.33‱). Fr. 4 was subjected to polyamide CC using CH2Cl2-CH3OH-HCOOH as eluent (10:2:1, v/v). Promising subfraction Fr. 4-3 was eluted using CH3OH-H2O (1:1-1:0, v/v) withRP C-18 CC. Final purification was achieved by polyamide CC using CH2Cl2-CH3OH (10:4, v/v) to yield 1 (0.803 g, 0.54%).Fr.5 was subjected to polyamide CC with CH2Cl2-EtOAc-CH3OH(5:5:1,v/v) as the solvent. Fr.5-3 and Fr. 5-5 were isolated using polyamide/RP C-18/Sephadex LH-20 CC to yield 5 (11 mg, 0.73‱), 11 (8 mg, 0.53‱) and 12 (5 mg, 0.33‱). Fr.7.1 collected from Fr. 7 with EtOAc-CH3OH(10:2, v/v) were passed through polyamide CC, and purified by ODS-HPLC using a gradient of CH3OH-H2O(3:7-9:1,v/v))as eluent to yield 3 (10 mg, 0.66 ‱) and 9 (5 mg, 0.33‱). Fr. 8-1, Fr.8-3 and Fr.8-4 obtained from Fr. 8 with CH2Cl2-CH3OH(10:2,v/v) were isolated using ODS- HPLC/Sephadex LH-20 CC to yield 2 (150 mg, 0.1%), 4 (5 mg, 0.33‱), 8 (3 mg, 0. 20‱) and 10 (8 mg, 0.53‱).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":171,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":174,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":178,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":356,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":563,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":566,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":570,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":654,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":659,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":749,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":752,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":756,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":843,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":846,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":856,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1066,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1162,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1167,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1292,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1295,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1299,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1610,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1613,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1617,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":1795,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2002,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2005,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2009,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2093,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2098,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2188,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2191,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2195,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2281,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2284,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2294,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2507,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2603,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2608,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2736,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2739,"length":1},{"style":"sub","offset":2743,"length":1},{"style":"bold","offset":481,"length":1},{"style":"bold","offset":501,"length":3},{"style":"bold","offset":781,"length":1},{"style":"bold","offset":970,"length":2},{"style":"bold","offset":988,"length":3},{"style":"bold","offset":1008,
